5. Keep the tone professional but approachable
6. Write ONLY the question, no preamble or extra text

turns.user_answer: Our inventory of external services (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS, APIs) is governed by our [Cloud Security and Third-Party Risk Management Policies], requiring formal risk assessment and approval prior to adoption.
